title: CPA
description: When Dr. Gleim wrote the first CPA self-study book in 1974, he started the entire exam prep industry as we know it. We’ve remained at the forefront since.Authored by industry leaders and accounting educators, featured at hundreds of colleges and universities worldwide, and used to pass millions of exams, Gleim CPA Review is ready to help you pass.
